'''Ame Llom''', a [[Gender/Legends|female]]<ref name="DB" /> member of a [[Near-Human]] [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Ame Llom's species|species]],<ref name="Who'sWho" /> was a [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Coruscanti/Legends|of]]<ref name="DB" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Year">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. On her homeworld, she frequented the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]],<ref name="DB" /> a [[Nightclub/Legends|nightclub]] and [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] hall in the planet's [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]],<ref name="CSWE2">{{CSWECite|II|431|Outlander Club}}</ref> during the last few [[Local year|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="DB" />

During a [[Local day/Legends|night]] In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> Llom visited the club and chatted with two [[Human/Legends|Humans]],<ref name="aotc">{{Film|II}}</ref> one of which was the woman [[Sne Wo]].<ref name="Who'sWho" /> [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], passed by a laughing Llom and the Humans as he was searching for the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]]. Shortly after, Llom, holding a drink, walked with the other Human near the bar of the club. Just moments later, Wesell was disarmed by the Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] at the bar.<ref name="aotc" />

Llom had [[Color/Legends|blue-green]] skin,<ref name="Who'sWho" /> brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and black [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="DB" /> While at the club,<ref name="aotc" /> she wore a beaded decoration on her forehead,<ref name="DB" /> and a dark hooded [[Clothing/Legends|top]] that showed her midriff.<ref name="aotc" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|With her blue-green skin, Ame Llom is a near-human alien of a species not yet described in the Expanded Universe.|Daniel Wallace|<ref name="Who'sWho" />}}
Ame Llom first appeared in the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']],<ref name="aotc" /> which released on [[May 16]], [[2002]].<ref name="Year" /> The Outlander Club scenes including Llom, who was portrayed by uncredited extra,<ref name="aotc" /> were shot at [[Fox Studios, Sydney]] on [[July 17]], [[2000]].<ref name="Mythmaking">''[[Mythmaking: Behind the Scenes of Attack of the Clones]]''</ref> The character was first revealed when the extra playing Llom, in costume, introduced the fourth episode of the Episode II behind-the-scenes video series [[On location|''on location'']].<ref name="On location">{{SWArchive|url=episode-ii/bts/onloc/4.html|series=On Location|text=Part 4 - The Man Behind C-3PO}}</ref> The episode, titled "The Man Behind C-3PO," was released on [[August 22]], 2000.<ref name="Archive">{{SWArchive|url=episode-ii/bts/onloc/archive.html|text=''on location'' archive}}</ref> "Ame Llom" is a backwards rearrangement of Mollema, the maiden name of [[Lucas Licensing]] employee [[Stacy Cheregotis|Stacy Chergotis]].<ref name="Who'sWho" />  

Llom was first identified<ref name="Who'sWho" /> in the [[April 6]], [[2004]]<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20040315.html|text=The New Face of Evil}}</ref> article "[[Who's Who in the Outlander Club: It's Ladies' Night]]", written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and published in the [[Star Wars Insider 75|seventy-fifth]] issue of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''. Wallace reveals in the article that the character is a member of an unidentified [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="Who'sWho" />
